data:
Search results for "site:llvmlite.readthedocs.io optimization passes new pass manager":

Title: Optimization passes - llvmlite - Read the Docs
URL: https://llvmlite.readthedocs.io/en/stable/user-guide/binding/optimization-passes.html
Content: # Optimization passes¶. Optimization passes are managed by a pass manager. llvmlite provides bindings for LLVM’s *New Pass Manager*. Prior to llvmlite 0.45 (LLVM 20), llvmlite also supported the *Legacy Pass Manager*, which had a different API and behavior. The differences between them and the motivations for the New Pass Manager are outlined in the LLVM Blog post on the New Pass Manager. As of llvmlite 0.45 (LLVM 20), support for the Legacy Pass Manager has been removed. ## New Pass Manager APIs¶. :   The level of optimization for size, as an integer between 0 and 2. :   A pass manager for running optimization passes on an LLVM module. :   A pass manager for running optimization passes on an LLVM function. :   Create a new pass manager to run optimization passes on a module. :   Create a new pass manager to run optimization passes on a function of the given *module*, a `ModuleRef` instance.

Title: Optimization passes - llvmlite - Read the Docs
URL: https://llvmlite.readthedocs.io/en/v0.45.0rc1/user-guide/binding/optimization-passes.html
Content: # Optimization passes¶. Optimization passes are managed by a pass manager. llvmlite provides bindings for LLVM’s *New* and *Legacy* pass managers, which have slightly different APIs and behaviour. The differences between them and the motivations for the New Pass Manager are outlined in the LLVM Blog post on the New Pass Manager. It is recommended that new code using llvmlite uses the New Pass Manager, and existing code using the Legacy Pass Manager be updated to use the New Pass Manager. ## New Pass Manager APIs¶. :   The level of optimization for size, as an integer between 0 and 2. :   A pass manager for running optimization passes on an LLVM module. :   A pass manager for running optimization passes on an LLVM function. :   Create a new pass manager to run optimization passes on a module. :   Create a new pass manager to run optimization passes on a function of the given *module*, a `ModuleRef` instance.

URL: https://llvmlite.readthedocs.io/_/downloads/en/v0.39.1/pdf
Content: ModulePassManager. Create a new pass manager to run optimization passes on a module. The run method is available: run(module). Run
